name: Scallops Florentine
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 lb Fresh spinach, stems cut off and reserved
1 1/4 lb Bay scallops, rinsed and drained
8 Shell or small pasta, al dente and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Position rack in the center of the oven and preheat to 425°F.
2. Mince spinach stems and garlic in a food processor.
3. Melt butter in a heavy skillet over medium-low heat.
4. Stir in the garlic mixture and sauté until the spinach stems are very soft (about 8 minutes).
5. Add whipping cream and simmer until reduced by half (about 5 minutes).
6. Coarsely chop spinach leaves in batches using off on turns in a food processor.
7. Add to the cream mixture with nutmeg and pepper.
8. Increase heat to high and cook until spinach is heated through about 3 minutes.
9. Remove from heat, stir in scallops and pasta.
10. Transfer to a shallow 4-quart baking dish.
11. Sprinkle with reserved Parmesan cheese over top.
12. Bake until scallops are just opaque, about 10 to 12 minutes. Serve immediately.
